final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3x3 character expression grid illustration for 赵灵儿 (Zhao Ling'er) from the IP 仙剑奇侠传 (Chinese Paladin), rendered in 3D animation Pixar style.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar-style rendering with soft subsurface skin shading, warm cel-influenced lighting, high-fidelity character consistency across all 9 panels
Composition: strict 3x3 grid layout, 9 equal panels, each panel shows a bust-level portrait of 赵灵儿 peeking through a torn hole in white paper; torn paper edges are ragged and tactile; character is centered within each hole; consistent scale and framing across all panels
Subject: 赵灵儿 — young woman with long flowing silver-white hair, delicate ethereal features, soft luminous skin, gentle fairy-like aura true to the 仙剑奇侠传 IP; each panel shares the same character base with only expression, action, and outfit varying
Scene/backdrop: white paper surface as the universal backdrop; the torn hole reveals the character emerging from behind; no complex background scenery — paper texture is the only environmental element
Lighting/mood: soft diffused front lighting with subtle warm fill, consistent across all 9 panels to unify the grid; mood shifts gently per expression but overall tone is playful and charming
Color palette: white paper as neutral base; each panel's outfit provides the accent color anchor; skin tone and hair color remain constant across all panels
Materials/textures: smooth 3D skin with soft sheen, fabric textures vary per outfit, torn paper edges show fibrous paper texture
Text (verbatim): "仙剑奇侠传" "赵灵儿"
Constraints: character identity (face, hair, skin tone) must remain consistent across all 9 panels; each panel must clearly show the torn-paper-hole framing device; 3x3 grid must be evenly spaced with thin white gutters; panel order strictly follows: top-left → top-center → top-right → middle-left → middle-center → middle-right → bottom-left → bottom-center → bottom-right
Panel details (row by row):
  [top-left] expression: winking, action: adjusting glasses, outfit: green sweater
  [top-center] expression: smirking, action: lowering dark sunglasses, outfit: red leather jacket
  [top-right] expression: thinking, action: finger on chin, outfit: yellow hoodie
  [middle-left] expression: big smile, action: arms resting on edge of hole, outfit: black and white striped shirt
  [middle-center] expression: smiling, action: thumbs up, outfit: orange button-up shirt
  [middle-right] expression: neutral, action: drinking boba tea, outfit: blue sweater
  [bottom-left] expression: happy, action: waving, outfit: purple sweater vest over white shirt
  [bottom-center] expression: laughing with eyes closed, action: arms crossed, outfit: pink cardigan
  [bottom-right] expression: silly, action: poking cheeks, outfit: teal sweater
Avoid: inconsistent face shape across panels, generic anime face replacing 赵灵儿's specific features, cluttered backgrounds behind the paper, uneven grid spacing, flat 2D illustration style, watermark, text overlays, deformed hands
